name: Oysters and Tiger Pearls
steps: Bring together water and dark soy to a boil and whisk in Tapioca Pearls.
Cook for 15-20 minutes whisking every so often to prevent tapioca from sticking to the bottom.
Strain through a sieve and run quickly under cold water to stop cooking and wash excess starch.
Place in container and add Tiger Dressing to absorb.
Place immediately in Blast Freezer to stop cooking.
